description: Use this API to purge new vscdc GIC shunt data from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.8.0. ierr = gic_vscdc_purg(name,bus,ckt)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Vscdc line name, must exist in the working case. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: bus
parameters.description: Base case bus number, must exist in the working case. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ckt
parameters.description: Gic dc shunt circuit identifier. (input; ‘1’ by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
